narrative_text: A tiny, adventurous hermit crab has discovered a shimmering, magical pearl buried in the tide pool. But as the sun sets, the pearl begins to glow with a mysterious map—where will it lead him?
branch_summary: Join a brave hermit crab on a quest to follow a glowing treasure map across the sparkling shore.
scene_description: A vibrant coastal tide pool at golden hour, with the sun low on the horizon casting long, honey-colored shadows and sparking highlights on the water's surface. The atmosphere is peaceful and magical, featuring a palette of deep teals, warm oranges, and shimmering golds. The composition focuses on a central sandy patch surrounded by colorful sea life.
background_description: A serene beach at sunset with a gradient sky of peach and violet, calm turquoise water meeting a shoreline of fine, pale-gold sand, and distant purple silhouettes of rocky cliffs under a hazy, warm atmosphere.

properties.color: bright coral-orange body with a polished cream-colored shell
properties.size: small, roughly the size of a grapefruit
properties.texture: hard, glossy exoskeleton and a smooth, calcified shell
properties.pattern: swirling tan spiral patterns on the shell and tiny white speckles on the claws
properties.distinctive_features: one claw is slightly larger than the other, and it wears a tiny, seaweed-braided headband

entities.pose: standing tall on many thin legs, both claws opened wide in surprise, eye-stalks fully extended and tilting toward the ground

properties.color: iridescent milky-white with a pulsing neon-blue core
properties.size: small, about the size of a marble
properties.pattern: glowing blue veins that resemble a coastline map
properties.distinctive_features: emits a soft, rhythmic blue light and tiny floating bubbles

entities.pose: half-buried in the sand at a slight tilt, with the glowing side facing upward

properties.color: vibrant fuchsia base with electric-purple tentacles
properties.size: medium, wider than it is tall
properties.texture: squishy and gelatinous with flowy appendages
properties.pattern: ring of neon-green spots around the central mouth
properties.distinctive_features: many long, wiggly tentacles that sway gently

entities.pose: anchored firmly, tentacles fanned out in a wide circle and waving upward

properties.color: weathered silvery-gray with patches of dried salt
properties.texture: rough, sun-bleached wood with deep cracks
properties.pattern: winding grain lines and small circular knot-holes
properties.distinctive_features: twisted into a shape resembling a reaching hand, with a few dried barnacles attached

entities.pose: lying flat and heavy, partially buried in the sand with one gnarled branch pointing toward the sky
